Appearance

PacksterPackage Version Management

Store, retrieve, and manage versioned build artifacts with a simple REST API.

API Reference
View on GitHub

Token-based Auth

Every request is authenticated via an X-Api-Token header. Admin tokens can manage users; per-product permissions control who can upload, download, or delete.

Product Lifecycle

Create products, grant token access, and manage multiple named versions — all through a clean REST API.

Artifact Storage

Upload arbitrary files as versioned artifacts. SHA-256 checksums are computed and stored automatically.
